card_text:
Llama 3.2 Vision 11B - Multimodal instruction-tuned model.

Vision Benchmarks:
- MMMU: 50.7% (0-shot, CoT)
- MathVista: 51.5% (testmini)
- ChartQA: 83.4% (test, CoT)
- DocVQA: 88.4% (test, ANLS)
- VQAv2: 75.2% (test)
- TextVQA: 73.1% (val)

Image reasoning, visual recognition, OCR, 128K context window.
